deposit.verified: Your deposit of {amount} ETB has been verified and added to your capital. Your package is now active.
deposit.rejected: Your deposit of {amount} ETB was rejected. Reason: {reason}
deposit.pending: Your deposit of {amount} ETB is pending verification. We will review it within 24 hours.
deposit.scheduleDayOff: Deposits are only available on {days}. Today is {today}.
deposit.amountLimits: Deposit amount must be between {min} and {max} ETB.
deposit.duplicateVerified: This transaction ID has already been verified and credited. Each bank transfer can only be used once.
deposit.duplicatePendingSelf: You have already submitted this transaction ID. It is pending verification. Please wait or contact support.
deposit.duplicatePendingOther: This transaction ID has already been submitted by another user.
deposit.duplicateRejected: This transaction ID was previously rejected. Please contact an admin to unblock it before resubmitting.
deposit.duplicateUnknown: This transaction ID cannot be used. Please contact support.
deposit.notFound: Deposit not found or it has already been processed.
deposit.notRejected: Deposit not found or it is not in rejected status.
deposit.unblocked: Transaction ID has been unblocked. The user can now resubmit their deposit.
deposit.verifiedSuccess: Deposit verified successfully. Package activated and commissions distributed.

withdrawal.approved: Your withdrawal of {amount} ETB has been approved and sent to your bank account.
withdrawal.rejected: Your withdrawal of {amount} ETB was rejected. Reason: {reason}. Amount has been refunded to your balance.
withdrawal.pending: Your withdrawal request for {amount} ETB is being processed. You will receive your funds within 24-48 hours.
withdrawal.scheduleDayOff: Withdrawals are only available on {days}. Today is {today}.
withdrawal.amountNotAllowed: Withdrawal amount must be one of: {amounts} ETB
withdrawal.insufficientEarnings: Insufficient earnings. Available: {available} ETB. Your capital is locked and cannot be withdrawn.
withdrawal.notFound: Withdrawal not found or it has already been processed.

task.allCompleted: You completed all {count} tasks today and earned {amount} ETB. Come back tomorrow!
task.scheduleDayOff: Tasks are only available on {days}. Today is {today}.
task.noPackage: No active package. Please deposit to activate a package.
task.restDayMessage: Tasks are not available today. Share your referral link and earn while you rest!
task.commissionReceived: You earned {amount} ETB from a Level {level} team member's task.

commission.referralReceived: You received {amount} ETB from a Level {level} referral deposit.
commission.taskReceived: You earned {amount} ETB from a Level {level} team member's task.

suspension.banned: Your account has been permanently banned. Reason: {reason}. You cannot register again with this phone number.
suspension.suspended: Your account has been suspended. Reason: {reason}. Please contact support for assistance.

warning.received: You have received a warning. Reason: {reason}. This is warning #{count}. Continued violations may result in account suspension.
warning.title: Warning Received

admin.levelChanged: Your package has been changed to {package} by admin.
admin.packageRemoved: Your active package has been removed by admin.
admin.moneyAdded: Admin has added {amount} ETB to your earnings. Reason: {reason}
admin.managerRankAssigned: You are now a "{rank}". This rank comes with privileges and recognition.

giftCode.maxUses: This gift code has reached its maximum uses.
giftCode.alreadyRedeemed: You have already redeemed this code.

auth.accountSuspended: Your account has been suspended. Please contact support.
auth.accountBanned: Your account has been permanently banned.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters.
auth.passwordNeedNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
auth.passwordNeedUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
auth.passwordNeedSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character.

common.networkError: Network error. Please check your internet connection and try again.
common.serverError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
common.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please login again.
common.permissionDenied: You don't have permission to {action}. Contact the super admin for access.
common.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
common.validationError: Please check your input and try again.
